title: Populating a dictionary with a constant value should be done with dict.fromkeys() method call
description: Using a loop or multiple assignments to populate a dictionary with constant values can lead to unnecessary complexity and readability issues.
message: Avoid populating a dictionary with constant values using a loop or multiple assignments.

noncompliant.description: Using multiple assignments to populate a dictionary with constant values

compliant.description: Using dict.fromkeys() to populate a dictionary with constant values

why_is_this_an_issue: Using a loop or multiple assignments to populate a dictionary with constant values can lead to unnecessary complexity and readability issues.

metadata.title: Populating a dictionary with a constant value should be done with dict.fromkeys() method call
